{{Missing Info}}

==T-Day Feast==
[[File:T-Day Celebration Poster.png|200px|left|alt=T-Day Celebration]]
Nov. 17 - Nov. 23 2023
{{Clear}}

= Relic Rewards =
'''Choice Of'''
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Archimedes' Lever|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Wheat|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Lotus Chalice|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Medal of Honor|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Phoenix Feather|orange}}

= Shell Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Handmade Steamed Buns|purple}} (Shell)

[[Category:Events]]
